2605.17537.title: Self-supervised Hierarchical Visual Reasoning with World Model
2605.17537.paper_summary: 3D open-world environments with adversarial opponents remain a core challenge for reinforcement learning due to their vast state spaces. Effective reasoning representations are essential in such settings. While existing self-supervised visual foresight reasoning approaches often suffer from multi-step error accumulation, many recent studies resort to injecting domain-specific knowledge for more stable guidance. Our key insight is that the photorealistic fidelity of visual reasoning representations is secondary; what truly matters is providing informative, task-relevant signals. To this end, we propose ResDreamer, a hierarchical world model in which each higher-level layer is trained to reconstruct the residuals of the layer below. This design enables progressive abstraction of increasingly sophisticated world dynamics and fosters the emergence of richer latent representations. Drawing inspiration from the "Bitter Lesson", ResDreamer trains its reasoning representations in a purely self-supervised manner. The higher-level residual representations are used to modulate lower-level predictions, allowing the world model to scale effectively with only linearly increasing cross-layer communication costs. Experiments show that ResDreamer achieves state-of-the-art sample efficiency and parameter efficiency. This scalable hierarchical visual foresight reasoning architecture paves the way for more capable online RL agents in open-ended, dynamic environments. The code is accessible at \url{https://github.com/XuYuanFei01/ResDreamer}.
2605.17537.paper_summary_zh: 3D 開放世界環境與對抗性對手仍然是強化學習的一個核心挑戰，因為它們擁有龐大的狀態空間。<lb/>在這樣的環境中，有效的推理表示是至關重要的。<lb/>雖然現有的自我監督視覺預見推理方法常常遭受多步錯誤累積的問題，但許多近期研究則依賴於注入特定領域的知識以獲得更穩定的指導。<lb/>我們的關鍵見解是，視覺推理表示的照片真實性是次要的；真正重要的是提供有信息量的、與任務相關的信號。<lb/>為此，我們提出了 ResDreamer，一種分層世界模型，其中每個高層級層都被訓練以重建下層的殘差。<lb/>這種設計使得逐步抽象越來越複雜的世界動態成為可能，並促進了更豐富潛在表示的出現。<lb/>受到「苦澀教訓」的啟發，ResDreamer 以純自我監督的方式訓練其推理表示。<lb/>高層的殘差表示用於調節低層的預測，允許世界模型在僅線性增加的跨層通信成本下有效擴展。<lb/>實驗表明，ResDreamer 在樣本效率和參數效率方面達到了最先進的水平。<lb/>這種可擴展的分層視覺預見推理架構為在開放式、動態環境中更強大的在線強化學習代理鋪平了道路。<lb/>代碼可在 \url{https://github.com/XuYuanFei01/ResDreamer} 獲得。
2605.17537.author: Yuanfei Xu et.al.
2605.17537.authors: Yuanfei Xu, Lin Liu, Wengang Zhou, Mingxiao Feng, Houqiang Li
